mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls above 100k signals strong labor market demand, driving corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below its 3-month moving average indicates weakening supply chain capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO falls below its 3-month MA, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts and retail sales forecasts signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through sectoral earnings momentum.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where both HOUST and RSAFS exceed thresholds, or the interaction term's IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: In high-rate regimes, rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) signals central bank inaction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days due to real rate uncertainty.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL rises and FEDFUNDS > 4.5%, or the interaction term's IC drops below -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in unemployment rate below 5% signals tight labor market conditions, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through wage-driven consumer spending.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE < 5%, or the signal's IC drops below 0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts indicates robust demand-side momentum, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through sectoral earnings acceleration.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in 50%+ of instances where both GDPC1 and HOUST exceed thresholds, or the interaction term's IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in CPI inflation above 2.5% signals central bank policy inaction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through real rate uncertainty and bond yield volatility.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%, or the signal's IC drops below -0.05 in rolling 1-year windows.
